event: Engraving of ruins along the ancient Via Appia outside Porta San Sebastiano
description: A detailed black and white engraving shows a collection of ancient Roman architectural fragments and ruins assembled in a vertical composition. Carved reliefs, inscriptions, decorative elements, draped figures, and ornamental stonework are piled together in an imaginative arrangement. Latin text appears at the bottom. The rendering is precise and heavily cross-hatched in the tradition of 18th-century architectural engravings.

_meta.title: Part of the ancient Via Appia outside the Porta St. Sebastian about three miles
